purpose: Live Sound environment SVG kit for Signal Flow normal patching boards
style_reference: Live Sound Gear concept sheet: dark front-view rack hardware, realistic connectors, blue PowerCON/SpeakON accents, amber displays, gunmetal panels.
integration_notes: Apply to all normal LIV patching levels, not only one level.
Keep existing DOM jack buttons, labels, cable layer, scoring, undo, clear, hints and route validation intact.
Use these SVGs as decorative/hardware layers with pointer-events:none unless explicitly interactive.
Meters/LEDs should be activated from valid route state, recomputed after route add, undo, clear and level load.
updated: connector fixes: xlr male/female and stagebox link out spacing
notes: Replaced amber lamp asterisk with glass pilot-light lens; realigned FOH, IEM/wireless, and system utility rack panels.
scalePolicy: v1.8 locks connector scale to the Live Sound concept art; XLRs are large panel hardware and should not be normalized to generic icon size.

xlr_geometry.orientation: PUSH latch at 12 oclock; two upper contacts horizontal beneath latch; one lower contact centered at 6 oclock
xlr_geometry.spacing: compact equilateral-style contact triangle based on stagebox concept art, not the previous wide/low layout
xlr_geometry.integration_note: Do not rotate or flip XLR assets in CSS. Preserve the natural upright SVG orientation.
